title: Route & bus stop management CRUD
description: Admin-only endpoints and UI to manage routes and stops.

subtasks.title: API: CRUD for BusStop
subtasks.description: Create/list/update/delete stops, each with lat/lng (ideally picked on a map in the UI).

subtasks.title: API: CRUD for Route
subtasks.description: Create/list/update/delete routes; support reordering the stops array.

subtasks.title: Assign bus(es) to route
subtasks.description: PATCH endpoint to link a bus's routeId; UI dropdown in the bus form.

subtasks.title: Admin UI: route builder
subtasks.description: Form to name a route and add/reorder/remove stops from it.
